CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-16-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Continued To Jan-08-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Phil Foster, Esq. of Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices (415) 626-7744 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Andrew M. Gschwind, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3973 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff to specify facts when cause of action allegedly accrued. No allegation that a late claim application was made. Plaintiff's counsel will prepare Order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
